info.title: XrmMockup.MetadataGenerator.Tool
info.description: CLI tool for generating XrmMockup metadata from Dataverse

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: XrmMockup Metadata Generator - Generate metadata from Dataverse for XrmMockup testing

options.name: --output
options.description: Output directory for generated metadata files

options.name: --solutions
options.description: Comma-separated list of solution unique names

options.name: --entities
options.description: Comma-separated list of additional entity logical names to include

options.name: --pretty-print
options.description: Format XML output for readability (increases file size) [default: False]

options.name: --security-roles
options.description: Comma-separated list of additional security role names to include

options.name: --all-security-roles
options.description: Include all security roles regardless of solution or named role filtering [default: False]
